Pre-Publish SEO Check

Internal publishing checks for title, description, headings, FAQ, canonical, schema, sitemap, internal links, images, and content depth. This is not a user behavior or tool usage report.

Publishing Gate

Before pushing new articles, fix pages below 80, review warnings, then rebuild. The JSON version is available at /admin/seo-report.json.
